title: scyphostelma microphylla
intro: Scyphostelma microphylla is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Scyphostelma microphylla include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Scyphostelma microphylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
